commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin auto-enable allowlist handling so an empty `plugins.allow` remains open while configured plugins are enabled, with focused regression coverage for doctor/provider enable paths.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +117. Total +118 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence current-main reproduction path: `applyPluginAutoEnable` calls `ensurePluginAllowlisted`, and that helper appends to `plugins.allow: []` because it only skips missing or already-containing arrays. I did not run the proof command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; maintainers should review the compatibility-sensitive config semantics and CI before merge.
